task: Investigate the GitHub fork repo https://github.com/shivam2014/nyro-reasoning-fix (and its upstream). Determine: (1) upstream parent repo URL (the repo it was forked from) — use `gh repo view shivam2014/nyro-reasoning-fix --json parent` or web. (2) Fork default branch name and latest commit hash. (3) Upstream default branch latest commit hash. (4) Commits the fork is behind upstream (list recent upstream commit messages/hashes not in fork). (5) Upstream repo's git clone URL. Use gh api or web browsing. Report all with exact hashes.
